rulings.Case Title: ALEX BRANT-ZAWADZKI VS. BOB KORMAN et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 19, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANT BOB KORMAN, NANCY RYTI DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Overrule Demurrer 1) Cause of actions 3 and 4 fraud sufficiently plead with particularity; 2) Cause of action 9 terms of contract sufficiently plead and 2 year statue of limitations not applicable. Sustain without leave to amend cause of actions 5, 6 and 7 because statue of limitations expired. Tort cause of actions accrued September 2009 at the latest. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALEX BRANT-ZAWADZKI VS. BOB KORMAN et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 19, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANT BOB KORMAN, NANCY RYTI MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Grant Striking all references to Rent Ordinance in Complaint. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: UNION BANK, N.A. VS. FRANK MYERS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Substitute Party Pltf
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 19, 2013, line 2. PLAINTIFF UNION BANK, N.A. Notice Of Motion To Substitute Party Plaintiff. Grant Substitution - opposing party cites no authority warranting Denial of motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MOSSER COMPANIES VS. JUAN FRANCISCO FRANCISCO ROJAS CHAVEZ et al
